raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 584 establishes a pilot program within the Department of Transportation to allow dairy truck operators to increase the size of the weight limit of raw milk during each haul if the vehicles use renewable fuels.",
    "The bill aims to incentivize heavy trucking fleets to transition to renewable fuels and electric vehicles.",
    "AB 584 has the potential to reduce the number of trucks on the road.",
    "There are roughly 2,200 truckloads of milk transported from farm to plant daily in California.",
    "Last year, trucks transporting essential commodities, including milk, were allowed to increase weight limits to 88,000 pounds.",
    "One cooperative saw its total number of loads transported decrease by 12 percent after the weight limit increase.",
    "Tying increased weight limits to renewable fuel usage can cut down on emissions and increase transport efficiency."
  ]
}
```
